name: RZVCONT
definition:
CREATE TRIGGER [dbo].[RZVCONT] ON [dbo].[SIPARISHAREKETLERI]
FOR INSERT, DELETE, UPDATE
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON

DECLARE @SIPRZVKUL AS INT
SELECT @SIPRZVKUL=SIPRZVKUL FROM GENELTANIMLAR WITH(NOLOCK)
IF ISNULL(@SIPRZVKUL,0)>0 
BEGIN
	DECLARE @C_INS AS INT SET @C_INS=ISNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INSERTED),0)
	DECLARE @C_DEL AS INT SET @C_DEL=ISNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DELETED),0)
	DECLARE @SB_REF AS INT
	DECLARE @SD_REF AS INT

	IF @C_INS=0 AND @C_DEL>0
	BEGIN
		DECLARE Dcur CURSOR LOCAL FOR  
		select SD_REF,SB_REF from DELETED GROUP BY SD_REF,SB_REF
		OPEN Dcur;  
		FETCH NEXT FROM Dcur 
		INTO @SD_REF,@SB_REF;
		WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0  
		BEGIN  
			EXEC dbo.REZERVEIPTALSD @SB_REF,@SD_REF,0
		FETCH NEXT FROM Dcur
		INTO @SD_REF,@SB_REF;
		END  
		CLOSE Dcur;  
		DEALLOCATE Dcur;
	END
	IF @C_INS>0 AND @C_DEL=0
	BEGIN
		DECLARE Dcur CURSOR LOCAL FOR  
		select SB_REF from INSERTED WHERE KAPALI=0 GROUP BY SB_REF
		OPEN Dcur;  
		FETCH NEXT FROM Dcur 
		INTO @SB_REF;
		WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0  
		BEGIN  
			UPDATE SIPARISFISLERI SET RZV=2 WHERE RZV=1 AND SB_REF=@SB_REF
		FETCH NEXT FROM Dcur
		INTO @SB_REF;
		END  
		CLOSE Dcur;  
		DEALLOCATE Dcur;
	END
	IF @C_INS>0 AND @C_DEL>0
	BEGIN
		DECLARE @STOK_REF AS INT
		DECLARE @VARYANT_REF AS INT 
		DECLARE @BIRIM_REF AS INT
		DECLARE @ANABIRIM_REF AS INT 
		DECLARE @CARPAN1 AS FLOAT
		DECLARE @CARPAN2 AS FLOAT
		DECLARE @KAPALI AS SMALLINT
		DECLARE @AMBAR_KODU AS NVARCHAR(50)
		DECLARE @SMIKTAR AS FLOAT
		DECLARE @RZVMIKTAR AS FLOAT
		DECLARE @RZVABMIKTAR AS FLOAT


		DECLARE Dcur CURSOR LOCAL FOR  
		SELECT SB_REF,SD_REF,STOK_REF,VARYANT_REF,BIRIM_REF,ANABIRIM_REF,CARPAN1,CARPAN2,KAPALI,AMBAR_KODU,SUM(MIKTAR-SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR) AS SMIKTAR
		FROM INSERTED GROUP BY SB_REF,SD_REF,STOK_REF,VARYANT_REF,BIRIM_REF,ANABIRIM_REF,CARPAN1,CARPAN2,KAPALI,AMBAR_KODU
		OPEN Dcur;  
		FETCH NEXT FROM Dcur 
		INTO @SB_REF,@SD_REF,@STOK_REF,@VARYANT_REF,@BIRIM_REF,@ANABIRIM_REF,@CARPAN1,@CARPAN2,@KAPALI,@AMBAR_KODU,@SMIKTAR;
		WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0  
		BEGIN  
			IF EXISTS ( SELECT SD_REF FROM DELETED WHERE 
			SD_REF=@SD_REF AND (STOK_REF<>@STOK_REF OR VARYANT_REF<>@VARYANT_REF OR BIRIM_REF<>@BIRIM_REF OR ANABIRIM_REF<>@ANABIRIM_REF OR 
			CARPAN1<>@CARPAN1 OR CARPAN2<>@CARPAN2 OR KAPALI<>@KAPALI OR AMBAR_KODU<>@AMBAR_KODU)
			GROUP BY SD_REF )
			BEGIN
				EXEC dbo.REZERVEIPTALSD @SB_REF,@SD_REF,0	
			END
			ELSE
			BEGIN
				SET @RZVMIKTAR=ISNULL((SELECT MIKTAR FROM REZERVESD WHERE SD_REF=@SD_REF),0)-@SMIKTAR
				SET @RZVABMIKTAR=ISNULL(@RZVMIKTAR*(@CARPAN2/@CARPAN1),0)
				IF @RZVMIKTAR>0
					EXEC dbo.REZERVEIPTALSDM @SD_REF,@RZVMIKTAR,@RZVABMIKTAR,0
			END
		FETCH NEXT FROM Dcur
		INTO @SB_REF,@SD_REF,@STOK_REF,@VARYANT_REF,@BIRIM_REF,@ANABIRIM_REF,@CARPAN1,@CARPAN2,@KAPALI,@AMBAR_KODU,@SMIKTAR;
		END  
		CLOSE Dcur;  
		DEALLOCATE Dcur;
	END
END
